caption: The video features a segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary under the title "PLUS POLITICS." The screen displays a statement attributed to Bola Tinubu, which reads, "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The visual includes a close-up image of a man wearing a white shirt and a patterned hat, likely representing Bola Tinubu. The background is dark, drawing attention to the text and the individual's image. The lower third of the screen provides information for viewers to watch the content online, directing them to the website www.plustvafrica.com/live-tv. The overall presentation suggests a news or discussion program centered around Nigerian politics and the role of Bola Tinubu in the country's current affairs.
